name.local: วัน แบงค็อก

location.address: Junction of Rama IV Road and Wireless Road, Lumphini, Pathum Wan, Bangkok 10330, Thailand

experience.summary: 曼谷最新大型综合开发项目，集购物艺术于一体
highlights: Gourmet food hall and fine dining

practical.transport: MRT: Direct access to MRT Lumphini Station (Blue Line); Walk to BTS: 15 min to BTS Sala Daeng; Parking: Massive underground parking available

recommendation.bestTime: Evening for city views and outdoor atmosphere

notes:
One Bangkok is the city's newest and largest mixed-use landmark. It features three distinct retail experiences: Parade, THE STOREYS, and POST 1928 (luxury). It is designed as a "city within a city," integrating green spaces with high-end shopping, art, and office space. It is a must-visit for those interested in the future of Bangkok's urban landscape.

---

name.en: Rom Hup Market / Maeklong Railway Market
name.local: ตลาดร่มหุบ
name.zh: 美功铁道市场 / 爆笑铁道市场

location.address: Mae Klong, Mueang Samut Songkhram District, Samut Songkhram 75000, Thailand

experience.summary: 美功铁道市场，摊位随火车往来收放的奇景
highlights: Train passing through the center of the market

practical.transport: Train: Take the train from Wongwian Yai to Mahachai, cross the river, and take the Ban Laem train to Maeklong.

recommendation.bestTime: Align your visit with the train arrival/departure times

notes:
"Rom Hup" translates to "Closing the Umbrella." This is a world-famous market where vendors set up their stalls directly on a functioning railway track. When the train signal sounds, the market transforms as stalls are moved back and umbrellas closed. Once the train passes, the market returns to normal instantly.

---

name.local: เอเชียทีค เดอะ ริเวอร์ฟรอนท์
name.zh: 河滨夜市 / 摩天轮夜市

location.address: 2194 Charoen Krung Road, Wat Phraya Krai, Bang Kho Laem, Bangkok 10120, Thailand

experience.summary: 河滨夜市，摩天轮与河景餐厅的休闲区

practical.transport: Boat: Free shuttle boat from BTS Saphan Taksin (Sathon Pier); Taxi: Traffic can be heavy on Charoen Krung Road

recommendation.bestTime: After 5:00 PM for the sunset and night atmosphere

notes:
Combining a mall and a night market, Asiatique is built on the former docks of the East Asiatic Company. It maintains a colonial warehouse theme. It is very tourist-oriented with many souvenir shops, various international restaurants, and entertainment options like a Ferris wheel and traditional puppet theater.

---
